hero.title: Questivo
hero.subtitle: Turn any place into a quest
hero.description: Create scavenger hunts, quiz trails, and real-world missions. Share a simple game code — players join instantly and progress mission by mission.
hero.socialProof: Game codes · Photo & GPS missions · Indoor & outdoor · 12 languages · No account required to play
hero.structuredDataDescription: Questivo is a scavenger hunt and mission app for iOS and Android. Create quests with riddles, photos, GPS checkpoints, and QR scans. Coming soon. com.zuki.apps.questivo.
hero.seoTitle: Questivo — Scavenger Hunts & Missions | Zuki Apps
hero.metaDescription: Build and play real-world quests with codes, photo tasks, and GPS checkpoints. Coming soon on iOS and Android.

features.title: Quests for home, parties, and the city

play.title: Play with a code
play.description: Enter a game code or scan a QR — no complicated setup for guests.

items: Riddles, codes, photos, GPS, QR missions
AI templates and Family Home Quest

privacy.title: Permissions on your control
privacy.description: Camera, photos, and location are used only for mission types that need them.

howTo.title: How to play
howTo.subtitle: From code to finale in three steps.

steps.title: Get the code
steps.description: Open Questivo, tap Play, and enter the host's game code or scan a QR.

steps.title: Complete missions
steps.description: Solve riddles, take photos, confirm GPS arrivals, or scan checkpoints in order.

steps.title: Share results
steps.description: See your score, journey recap, and optional surprise ending when you finish.

items.question: What is Questivo?
items.answer: A mobile app for scavenger hunts, quiz trails, and real-world missions. Hosts build quests and share a game code. Package: com.zuki.apps.questivo.

items.question: Do players need an account?
items.answer: No account is required to play. Optional cloud features may require sign-in when offered.

items.question: What permissions does Questivo use?
items.answer: Camera for photo missions, photos for image selection, and location for GPS checkpoint missions only. Deny permissions and related mission types will not work.

items.question: Is Questivo free?
items.answer: Core play and creation are free. Hosts may publish optional paid premium quests with in-app unlock.

status.title: Availability
status.description: Questivo is in development. App Store and Google Play listings coming soon.

footer.tagline: Part of Zuki Apps · by Zuki.Apps

privacy.title: Privacy Policy
privacy.intro: This Privacy Policy explains how Zuki Apps handles information when you use Questivo and related pages at zukiapps.com/questivo.

section1.title: 1. Who we are
section1.content: The data controller is Zuki Apps. Contact details are at the end of this Policy.
section1.content2: This Policy applies to the Questivo app and the legal pages we publish for the product.

section2.title: 2. Information we collect
section2.content: Questivo collects limited data to run the app. Quest content you create stays primarily on your device unless you use cloud features.
items: Feedback and support messages you send
Quest titles, clues, and media you add when creating quests (stored on device)
Crash diagnostics (Firebase Crashlytics) in release builds
Purchase records handled by Apple or Google — tokens only, not full card data

section3.title: 3. How we use information
section3.content2: We do not sell your personal information.

section4.title: 4. Device permissions
section4.content: Questivo may request camera, photo library, and location permissions for mission types that need them.
section4.content2: You can deny permissions; related mission types will not work. Location is used for GPS checkpoint missions only, not continuous tracking.

section5.title: 5. Storage and retention
section5.content: Quest progress and created quests remain on device until you uninstall.
section5.content2: Crash reports are retained per Firebase and Google policies.

section6.title: 6. Third-party services
section6.content: Optional cloud session data may be stored when live hosting or sync is enabled by the host environment.
section6.content2: Firebase, Apple, and Google may process data under their own policies.

section7.title: 7. Your rights and children
section7.content: Depending on your jurisdiction, you may have rights to access, correct, delete, or object to certain processing. Contact us to exercise rights.
section7.content2: Questivo is not directed to children under 13 without parental supervision for real-world play.

section8.title: 8. Changes
section8.content: We may update this Policy from time to time. We will post the revised version with a new Last updated date.

terms.title: Terms of Use
terms.intro: Please read these Terms carefully before using Questivo. By downloading or using the app, you agree to these Terms and our Privacy Policy.

section1.title: 1. Acceptance of Terms
section1.content: These Terms govern your use of Questivo operated by Zuki Apps. If you do not agree, do not use the Service.
section1.content2: If you use the Service on behalf of an organization, you represent that you have authority to bind that organization.

section2.title: 2. Description of Service
items: Create and play location-based quests, quizzes, and missions
Share game codes and optional live hosting
Optional paid quest unlocks via app stores

section3.title: 3. Safety and real-world play
section3.content: Questivo is entertainment. You are responsible for your safety while playing GPS or outdoor missions.
section3.content2: Obey local laws, traffic rules, and property rights. Do not play while driving. Supervise children.

section4.title: 4. Purchases
section4.content: Paid quests and unlocks are processed by Apple or Google. Their terms and refund policies apply.
section4.content2: Use Restore purchases after reinstall when applicable.

section5.title: 5. Acceptable use
items: Use the Service for unlawful purposes
Reverse engineer the app except as permitted by law
Interfere with security or stability features
Create content that infringes others' rights

section6.title: 6. Disclaimer
section6.content: THE APP IS PROVIDED AS IS WITHOUT WARRANTIES OF MERCHANTABILITY OR FITNESS FOR A PARTICULAR PURPOSE.
section6.content2: We do not guarantee uninterrupted or error-free service.

section7.title: 7. Limitation of liability
section7.content: To the maximum extent permitted by law, Zuki Apps shall not be liable for indirect, incidental, or consequential damages arising from use of the Service.

section8.title: 8. Changes
section8.content: We may modify these Terms. Continued use after the effective date constitutes acceptance.

support.title: Support & Help
support.subtitle: Find answers about Questivo.
support.metaDescription: Questivo FAQ — playing, hosting, purchases, and permissions.

contact.title: Contact us
contact.description: Email us and we will get back to you as soon as possible.

q1.question: How do players join?
q1.answer: Open Questivo, tap Play, and enter the host's game code or scan a QR on a poster or screen.

q2.question: Can I run an indoor quest?
q2.answer: Yes. Choose indoor mode — GPS missions are hidden automatically.

q3.question: How do paid quests work?
q3.answer: Prices are shown before purchase. Payments are processed by Apple or Google. Use Restore purchases after reinstall.

q4.question: What if a mission needs the camera?
q4.answer: Grant camera permission when prompted. Deny it and photo missions will not work.

additionalHelp.title: Need more help?
additionalHelp.description: If you could not find an answer, email zuki.apps.dev@gmail.com. We typically respond within 24–48 hours.
